description: Get all transactions for the authenticated user, with filtering and pagination.
request_payload: query_params: {start_date: Date, end_date: Date, category_ids: Array<UUID>, merchant_names: Array<String>, min_amount: Decimal, max_amount: Decimal, has_receipt: Boolean, currency: String, page: Integer, limit: Integer}

description: Get a specific transaction by ID.
Add a new manual transaction.
request_payload: body: {description: String, amount: Decimal, currency: String, transaction_date: Date, category_id: UUID (optional), tags: Array<String> (optional), account_id: UUID (optional)}

description: Update details of an existing transaction (e.g., category, tags, description).
request_payload: path_param: {transaction_id: UUID}, body: {category_id: UUID (optional), tags: Array<String> (optional), description: String (optional), merchant_name: String (optional), amount: Decimal (optional), transaction_date: Date (optional)}

description: Delete a manual transaction.
Get all categories (global and user-defined).
Create a new custom category.
request_payload: body: {name: String, icon: String (optional), parent_category_id: UUID (optional)}

description: Update an existing custom category.
request_payload: path_param: {category_id: UUID}, body: {name: String (optional), icon: String (optional), parent_category_id: UUID (optional)}

description: Delete a custom category.
Get all custom categorization rules for the authenticated user.
Create a new custom categorization rule.
request_payload: body: {rule_name: String, condition_type: String, condition_value: String, target_category_id: UUID, priority: Integer, is_active: Boolean}

description: Update an existing custom categorization rule.
request_payload: path_param: {rule_id: UUID}, body: {rule_name: String (optional), condition_type: String (optional), condition_value: String (optional), target_category_id: UUID (optional), priority: Integer (optional), is_active: Boolean (optional)}

description: Delete a custom categorization rule.
Trigger re-categorization for all un-categorized or recently updated transactions based on rules.
Upload a receipt image for a specific transaction.
Get receipt details for a transaction.
Delete a receipt.
Get all budgets for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by status.
Get details and progress for a specific budget.
Create a new spending budget.
request_payload: body: {name: String, budget_amount: Decimal, currency: String, start_date: Date, end_date: Date, frequency: String, rollover_overspend: Boolean, rollover_underspend: Boolean, alert_threshold_percentage: Integer, budget_items: Array<{category_id: UUID (optional), tag: String (optional)}>}

description: Update an existing budget.
request_payload: path_param: {budget_id: UUID}, body: {name: String (optional), budget_amount: Decimal (optional), currency: String (optional), start_date: Date (optional), end_date: Date (optional), frequency: String (optional), rollover_overspend: Boolean (optional), rollover_underspend: Boolean (optional), alert_threshold_percentage: Integer (optional), budget_items: Array<{category_id: UUID (optional), tag: String (optional)}> (optional)}

description: Delete a budget.
Get all recurring payments for the authenticated user.
Add a new manual recurring payment.
request_payload: body: {name: String, amount: Decimal, currency: String, frequency: String, next_due_date: Date, is_subscription: Boolean (optional)}

description: Update details or status of a recurring payment.
request_payload: path_param: {payment_id: UUID}, body: {status: String (optional), next_due_date: Date (optional), name: String (optional), amount: Decimal (optional), frequency: String (optional), is_subscription: Boolean (optional)}

description: Delete a recurring payment.
Get current month's spending summary.
Get spending trends by category, merchant, or tag over a specified period.
request_payload: query_params: {start_date: Date, end_date: Date, interval: "day" | "week" | "month", group_by: "category" | "merchant" | "tag", currency: String (optional)}
response_payload: Array<{date: Date, group_name: String, amount: Decimal}>

description: Get aggregated data for the Insights Dashboard.
Initiate generation of a new financial report.
request_payload: body: {report_name: String, report_type: String, start_date: Date, end_date: Date, categories_included: Array<UUID> (optional), merchants_included: Array<String> (optional), include_receipts: Boolean, export_format: String}

description: Get a list of previously generated reports.
Download a generated report file.
